title: BI Analytics Lead
location: Hybrid — Dubai, UAE (3 days onsite; relocation required)

score.notes: Strong role fit: fintech BI lead maps to data-quality-program, reporting-turnaround, and warehouse-cost-cut; cohort work matches outreach-reallocation. Comp well above target. Visa scores mid: relocation requires sponsorship (per profile), but FinTrack sponsors and handles it. Remote scores low — 3 days onsite in Dubai conflicts with remote-first preference, though profile allows relocation for an exceptional onsite role. Weighted: 0.40*9+0.20*9+0.15*6+0.15*3+0.10*8 = 7.55 -> 7.

next_action.action: Human review of staged resume, then decide on relocation
